security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first trading agents with fixed risk limits
bundle.longDescription: DayTradingBot connects supported self-directed trading accounts to locally running strategies through one fail-closed risk and order engine.
